Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}There is a rare chance that a critical hit may occur when using physical skills or attacks. Landing a critical hit can knock down an enemy without targeting its weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Attacking an enemy with a status ailment will increase the likelihood of landing a critical hit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}There is a high chance of landing a critical hit when attacking an enemy in {f 0 1 2}Distress{f 0 1 27}, but a critical is guaranteed when attacking a {f 0 1 2}frozen{f 0 1 27} enemy.[n]{f 1 1}
